{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318313217DE89162C613F2EAFE7"}"},"total":1488},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7362491762847761214","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不溜，这本三国穿是我看的最好的一本，不涉及突然冒出来的知识技能和系统加成，全靠人力相辅相成，加以主角穿越对后事的引导，一切合理合规，希望后面不崩，加油熬，虽然现在还没媳妇，坐等，不介意多几个，哈哈哈"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714216383,"group_id":"7309359265326566462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6RDIOuITKqYVa7Vz73kFzgSoFd+ogY0qOigDupODyK0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2154666161871463","user_name":"发条胖子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2154666161871463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7309359265326566462","book_info":{"abstract":"已有完结书《三国：什么！貂蝉是我姐！》，新书《长板刘禅：我带云叔七进七出》
（三国演义世界观）
穿越汉末，无亲无故，无权无势，接下来就是乱世了。
怎么办？
当然是紧抱住大佬的大腿，努力的苟活下去了。
当然，
闲来无聊还是可以搞搞后世的发明，给大佬提提意见，帮助大佬把大腿越弄越粗。
结拜时，刘备：“咦，和三弟结拜还附个赠品！”
叶平开始种田后，刘备：“三弟啊，你怎么连个赠品都当不好，净惹麻烦！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7c9c9a10015145ea617d16698fbff325","author":"乡间小路","author_id":"","book_id":"7309359265326566462","book_name":"开局桃园四结义为刘备谋划未来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b098","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7309362081310982718","read_count":"14112","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1003535"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"468","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/1a9cbe23e169eee477c8ffac672bdbde~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445892&x-signature=cAZhES1SthmTeiINpSYPZN%2Buav8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"418234428829399","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"339"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318313217DE89162C613F2EAFE7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23061,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":58083,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3656},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7344984759697605400","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，不错，主角性格还可以，也不是那些天才，都是有大部分的三国演义特色的，毕竟不写三国演义也没多少人了解，算不错了，可以，我也喜欢蜀国。","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"三国演义","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742618923F2EAFE7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227344984759697605400%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227309359265326566462%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710142745,"group_id":"7309359265326566462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"龙是龙的传人，黄是炎黄子孙，是沉默寡言的书虫。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9GYT/ma2xXm3PRVGPbrEGtfUeHOhNWv7GZgwFpriNFk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1bd7693bd2f0480fac86d655680542d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796172&x-signature=YnEQ0zFXTKdj%2FnluSlJHAx7SJ4I%3D","user_id":"1956785131356340","user_name":"胸有成竹的龙黄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1956785131356340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1714931570,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"73 叶平开始种田后，刘备：“三弟啊，你怎么连个赠品都当不好，净惹麻烦！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7c9c9a10015145ea617d16698fbff325","author":"乡间小路","author_id":"","book_id":"7309359265326566462","book_name":"开局桃园四结义为刘备谋划未来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b098","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7309362081310982718","read_count":"14112","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1003535"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"468","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/1a9cbe23e169eee477c8ffac672bdbde~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445892&x-signature=cAZhES1SthmTeiINpSYPZN%2Buav8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"418234428829399","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318313217DE89162C613F2EAFE7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3055,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2714},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7325113365880177418","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的太好看了，全程都在笑，人物的性格都很贴近原形，在作者笔下，重情忠厚的刘备，耿直坦率又喜酒的张飞，武技高超的关羽生动形象地呈现在我面前，加上本书主角也趋于普通人，很有代入感，在推剧情的同时不忘描写适当的生活细节，紧张与舒缓把持有度，使我看的没有疲惫之感，三国题材作品我很喜欢，尤其喜欢作者的这本！希望作者大大多多更新！","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":78,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742618923F2EAFE7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227325113365880177418%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227309359265326566462%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705511953,"group_id":"7309359265326566462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4NwaDzxTZ8tWjR+grlk2Ec=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9eb5280a14a741d39c94545d0a669c3e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787987&x-signature=im1Ec9ECoiVZFVC5WnKdhQo6ONk%3D","user_id":"774527134734607","user_name":"湖蓝山高"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"774527134734607","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7309359265326566462","book_info":{"abstract":"已有完结书《三国：什么！貂蝉是我姐！》，新书《长板刘禅：我带云叔七进七出》
